caption: A person's hands hold a sports trading card featuring an athlete, identified by the text "STEVEN ADAMS," against a background with red and black graphics. The person's thumbs grasp the edges of the card, and they slightly tilt it, causing light to reflect off its glossy surface. The background includes a logo and the text "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM". In the upper right and lower right areas of the overall image, a small inset video window shows a man with dark hair and a beard wearing a black shirt, sitting at a table with various items. Throughout the sequence, the focus remains on the trading card being held and manipulated by the hands, while the background and the man in the inset remain relatively stationary.
